steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage opens with a causal statement: “We are creatures of the sun... we love light and life. That is why we crowd into the towns and cities.” This directly connects human traits to the choice to live in cities.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Choice C correctly identifies that the passage explains human traits (love of light and life) motivating urban migration. The other choices either treat a supporting detail as the main point or reverse what the passage actually claims. That matches choice C — C is correct.
